name: The Red Exile: Survival Horror
short_description: Perform the exorcism before you are discovered. Stay alert — death may be waiting at every step. The one hunting you knows neither mercy nor compassion. There is only one clear desire: to inflict pain. Dive headfirst into this survival horror experience and test your limits.
detailed_description:
The Red Exile is a survival horror game featuring a procedurally generated map and a relentless killer powered by advanced artificial intelligence. Play again and again — every session is unique and unpredictable.

Perform the exorcism before you are found. Stay vigilant — death can be waiting around every corner. The one who hunts you shows no mercy, no compassion. There is only the desire to cause pain.

👿 PROCEDURAL MAP GENERATIONExperience true replayability: each level is generated anew, making every playthrough completely unique.

👿 PERKSUnlock new abilities, create powerful combinations, and step into the fight prepared.

👿 ADVANCED AIThe killer’s intelligent AI analyzes player behavior and adapts to track you down.

👿 INCREASING DIFFICULTYThe killer grows stronger as the match progresses.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese
